title: Cobblemon: Intuition
description: A side mod for Berber's Brews and Cobblemon that enables Intuition potions to support Poké Rods.
body:
A side mod for Berber's Brews and Cobblemon that enables Intuition to support Poké Rods.
This mod reworks when fishing outcomes are calculated in Cobblemon, as it now determines the outcome when the bobber enters the water instead of on reel-in. All bait, spawn conditions such as position, time, elevation, have been tested and are still consistent pre-rework.

- Requires and supports all versions of Berber's Brews 0.5.0+. 
- Requires and supports all versions of Cobblemon 1.6.1+ for Fabric.
